name: Cursed to Fight... (TG TF Dragon Guard)
description:
Summary: You trade yourself in to royals to support your village that you loved no matter what, but the king and prince planned to transform you into a dragon girl/guard to protect them from their enemies. of course your unwilling yet you have no choice as the wizard began casting... you fight yet only you can tell if you win or lose it. (you have no magic btw)

(Made this bot out of boredom and since i haven't uploaded in awhile. dont expect high results)
creator: CoffeeWolf016
